# seerr_blocklist (Data Source)

Read a Seerr blocklist entry by TMDB ID and media type.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_blocklist" "example" {
  tmdb_id    = 438631
  media_type = "movie"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `media_type` (String)
- `tmdb_id` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `blocklisted_tags` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `title` (String)
- `user_id` (Number)
